emails.subject: Gathering System PSA
emails.body: Is this being looked at as an ENA acquistion also, or solely a Crescendo acquisition? Forwarded by Gerald Nemec/HOU/ECT on 01/23/2001 04:10 PM "Ken" <kckrisa@apex2000.net> 01/23/2001 03:52 PM Please respond to kckrisa

emails.subject: Gathering System PSA
emails.body: Is this being looked at as an ENA acquistion also, or solely a Crescendo acquisition? Forwarded by Gerald Nemec/HOU/ECT on 01/23/2001 04:10 PM "Ken" <kckrisa@apex2000.net> 01/23/2001 03:52 PM Please respond to kckrisa

emails.subject: Re: Gathering System PSA
emails.body: Re: Gathering System PSA Crescendo only acquisition. Gerald Nemec@ECT 01/23/2001 04:11 PM

emails.subject: Re: Gathering System PSA
emails.body: Re: Gathering System PSA Crescendo only acquisition. Gerald Nemec@ECT 01/23/2001 04:11 PM

emails.subject: Gathering System PSA
emails.body: Can you review the PSA on Crescendo's behalf, or is this something Teresa Bushman or outside counsel should review? Forwarded by Steve Pruett/Corp/Enron on 01/23/2001 05:26 PM Enron North America Corp. From: Mark Castiglione 01/23/2001 04:04 PM

emails.subject: Gathering System PSA
emails.body: Can you review the PSA on Crescendo's behalf, or is this something Teresa Bushman or outside counsel should review? Forwarded by Steve Pruett/Corp/Enron on 01/23/2001 05:26 PM Enron North America Corp. From: Mark Castiglione 01/23/2001 04:04 PM

emails.subject: Re: Gathering System PSA
emails.body: Re: Gathering System PSA Steve, We will probably use outside counsel that has worked with Crescendo before to handle this from Crescendo's perspective. I will coordinate from ENA's perspective. I am working with Teresa on this issue. Steve Pruett@ENRON 01/23/2001 06:00 PM

emails.subject: Re: Gathering System PSA
emails.body: Re: Gathering System PSA Steve, We will probably use outside counsel that has worked with Crescendo before to handle this from Crescendo's perspective. I will coordinate from ENA's perspective. I am working with Teresa on this issue. Steve Pruett@ENRON 01/23/2001 06:00 PM

emails.subject: Re: Gathering System PSA
emails.body: Who has worked with Crescendo in addition to Craig Carver? Despite Richard Sanders contact's reservations about Carver as a trial litigator, he marked up and helped negotiate over 20 PSA's for me over a 3 year time frame and I would recommend him. He turns things quickly as well. Gerald Nemec@ECT 01/24/2001 02:07 PM
